news.title: Alphabet stock sinks after Google parent announces $180 billion spending plan for 2026 in massive AI bet
news.snippet: Alphabet (GOOGL, GOOG) stock fell as much as 5% early Thursday as the tech giant's spending plans blew past forecasts, leaving investors questioning the scale and sustainability of Big Tech's investment plans to win the AI race.
